sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2705" key="ai)sxrh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰσχρήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n2705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shameful, base,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope> </bibl>*(dub.); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀσχήμων</foreign> Porson.</sense> </entryFree>
